analysis.consistency: The feature description is internally consistent and aligns with standard D&D 5e mechanics for Paladin class features.
analysis.quality: The description is high quality, clearly detailing the action cost, range (60 feet), duration (until the end of the next turn), targets (celestial, fiend, undead, consecrated/desecrated objects/places), sensory information provided (type, location, not identity), and usage/regain mechanism (uses equal to 1 + CHA modifier, regained on a long rest). The formatting correctly cross-references the 'hallow' spell.

mechanics.duration: Until the end of your next turn
mechanics.effect: Detects location and type of celestials, fiends, or undead; detects consecrated/desecrated objects/places.
mechanics.notes: This feature scales passively with the Paladin's primary spellcasting/social modifier (Charisma), which is standard and balanced.
